title: HUF-GOV Standalone Separation — Surgical Delineation with Triad-Supported Evidence
triggered_by: Peter's directive: 'first the huf-gov separation, surgical and precise with triad supported data.' Clean open-loop governance must be established independently before any closed-loop (HUF-CLS) claims. No cross-contamination.

core_separation_principle.statement: HUF-GOV is open-loop measurement and governance. It measures structural change in ratio-state systems, reports findings, and files evidence. It does NOT intervene, control, or close the loop. Every HUF-GOV claim must stand on its own evidence without requiring any HUF-CLS capability.
core_separation_principle.peter_directive: We cut ties with HUF-CLS in a pure HUF-GOV development.
core_separation_principle.why_separation_matters: If HUF-GOV claims depend on HUF-CLS demonstrations (e.g., BTL crossover tuning), then HUF-GOV is not standalone. Any reviewer who asks 'does this need the commercial product to work?' must get the answer NO. HUF-GOV stands alone or it doesn't stand.

three_entities.principle: HUF-GOV, HUF-CLS, and HUF-GOV∪HUF-CLS are three distinct entities. Each requires independent validation. Claims about one cannot be supported by evidence from another.

HUF_GOV.domains: All observation-only domains: Finance, Backblaze, EMBER, Planck, Gold/Silver, GDP (future), Ramsar (future)
HUF_GOV.loop_type: OPEN — HUF measures the domain. The domain does not change in response.
HUF_GOV.CL_layers: CL-01 (admission), CL-02 (TV), CL-03 (K_eff, PCA). CL-04 (governance criteria) as methodology, not as design authority.
HUF_GOV.deliverable: Free, open, academic. Published science. Universities and research labs can freely build and use open-loop products including open-loop BTL measurement.
HUF_GOV.authority: Open — anyone can use the methodology

HUF_CLS.scope: Measure, interpret, adjust, re-measure. Full feedback loop.
HUF_CLS.domains: BTL only (currently). SMAART v9 API integration (future).
HUF_CLS.loop_type: CLOSED — measurement feeds back to design feeds back to implementation feeds back to measurement
HUF_CLS.CL_layers: Full CL-01 through CL-05 stack. CL-04 (design criteria) and CL-05 (controller) are active, not just observed.
HUF_CLS.license: Commercial. HUF-CLS and HUF-GOV∪HUF-CLS both under commercial license. See RWA-001.

HUF_GOV_union_CLS.nature: The complete framework — both halves working together
HUF_GOV_union_CLS.scope: Open-loop science informing closed-loop engineering, closed-loop results validating open-loop methodology
HUF_GOV_union_CLS.requires: Both HUF-GOV and HUF-CLS independently established before union claims are defensible
HUF_GOV_union_CLS.status: NOT YET ESTABLISHED — HUF-CLS awaits BTL measurements

huf_gov_evidence_inventory.section_purpose: Every claim attributed to HUF-GOV, with its triad status. A claim requires independent validation in 3+ diverse domains to be considered triad-assured.

claim_1_ratio_state_compression.statement: RSM compresses high-dimensional ratio-state data into a small set of interpretable metrics (K_eff, TV, PCA loadings) without information loss relevant to structural assessment.
claim_1_ratio_state_compression.verdict: TRIAD ASSURED. This is HUF-GOV's strongest claim.

claim_2_structural_detection.statement: RSM detects structural change (TV spikes, K_eff shifts, coherence loss) in ratio-state systems with diagnostic specificity across 7 axes.
claim_2_structural_detection.triad_status: EXCEEDED — validated in 2+ domains with 14 measurements, 0 incorrect

domains.name: Finance
domains.type: Structural event detection in sector weights

domains.name: Backblaze
domains.type: Fleet transition detection in drive composition

claim_2_structural_detection.verdict: TRIAD PARTIALLY MET — 2 domains with comprehensive validation. Third domain needed for full triad assurance. EMBER or GDP can provide this.

claim_3_orthogonality_boundary.statement: RSM correctly identifies information boundaries: when the measurement carrier is aimed at one structural domain, orthogonal information is invisible regardless of prominence.

domains.name: Backblaze
domains.type: K_eff vs failure rate: r=-0.056, p=0.56

domains.name: Gold/Silver
domains.type: Currency structure vs price ratio: R²=-28, direction 47.8%

claim_3_orthogonality_boundary.verdict: TRIAD ASSURED. Three independent negative results confirming structural orthogonality.

claim_4_amplifier_ranking.statement: RSM correctly ranks domain elements by structural amplification (contribution to system-wide change).
claim_4_amplifier_ranking.verdict: SINGLE DOMAIN. Strong within finance (5 subdomains, tau=0.8) but triad requires 2 more diverse domains.
triad_candidates: Backblaze (which drive models amplify fleet transitions?)
EMBER (which fuel types amplify grid transitions?)

claim_5_forward_signal.statement: Deceptive drift (K_eff falling while TV stays calm) predicts future structural turbulence before it becomes visible.

domains.name: Finance
domains.type: 69 drift days identified, TV elevation at 10-20d horizon, p<0.001, split-sample validated

claim_5_forward_signal.verdict: SINGLE DOMAIN. This is the 'amazing 1-day advanced warning' — proven in finance, not yet replicated. TRIAD REQUIRES 2 MORE DIVERSE DOMAINS.

domain_2_EMBER.data: Monthly electricity generation by fuel type, per country
domain_2_EMBER.deceptive_drift_test: Did K_eff fall in the months before these known structural events while TV remained calm?
domain_2_EMBER.resolution: Monthly — coarser than finance daily, tests whether the signal scales to different temporal resolutions
domain_2_EMBER.feasibility: HIGH — EMBER provides open monthly data for 50+ countries

domain_3_GDP.data: Quarterly GDP by sector (agriculture, industry, services, etc.) per country
domain_3_GDP.deceptive_drift_test: Did sector composition K_eff fall in quarters before GDP structural events while TV remained calm?
domain_3_GDP.resolution: Quarterly — even coarser than EMBER, tests at yet another temporal scale
domain_3_GDP.feasibility: HIGH — World Bank/OECD provide quarterly sectoral GDP data

triad_plan.completion_criteria: If deceptive drift predicts structural events in 2 of 3 domains (finance + at least one of EMBER/GDP), the forward signal achieves triad status. If it fails in both non-financial domains, the signal is finance-specific and must be documented as such.

claim_6_scale_invariance.statement: RSM ratio-state mathematics hold across scales from 10 elements to 10 million elements.
claim_6_scale_invariance.triad_status: COMPUTATIONAL ONLY — 1 simulation (SCALE-001), 5.23 sigma, 34.9M tests, zero violations
claim_6_scale_invariance.verdict: Mathematically demonstrated by simulation and supported by empirical range spanning 4 orders of magnitude. Not a triad claim — this is a mathematical property, not an empirical finding requiring domain diversity.
claim_6_scale_invariance.note: Scale invariance follows from ratio-state mathematics operating on proportions summing to 1. Proportions are scale-free by definition.

claim_7_pll_monitoring.statement: RSM can continuously monitor a domain over extended periods, tracking structural evolution through PLL-style phase-locked observation.
claim_7_pll_monitoring.verdict: SINGLE DOMAIN. Demonstrated in Backblaze. Second domain needed (EMBER annual or Finance rolling window). Third domain needed for triad.

triad_assured: Ratio-state compression works across diverse domains (6 domains)
Orthogonality boundary is real — RSM correctly identifies what it cannot see (3 domains, 3 negative results)
strong_but_below_triad: Structural detection with 7-axis diagnostic (2 domains, 14 measurements, 0 incorrect — needs 1 more domain)
Amplifier ranking (1 domain, 5 subdomains, tau=0.8 — needs 2 more domains)
proven_single_domain: Forward signal via deceptive drift (finance only, p<0.001, split-sample validated — needs 2 more domains)
PLL continuous monitoring (Backblaze only, 2 years — needs 2 more domains)
not_claimable_under_huf_gov: Closed-loop control (HUF-CLS territory — requires BTL measurements)
Ramsar deployment readiness (no Ramsar data processed, forward signal not yet triad-assured)
Universal forward signal (single domain — overclaim without triad)
Formal mathematical proofs (proof sketches only, 21 claimed)

separation_boundaries.section_purpose: Explicit rules for what belongs where. If a claim touches both sides, it goes in the union category and requires both sides independently established first.
purely_huf_gov: All ratio-state compression results (SF-001, BBSF-001, GS-001, etc.)
All forward signal / deceptive drift results (CL03-SENS-001, CL03-SENS-002)
Calibration rack tests T1a through T5a (all observation-only)
Peterson convergence analysis (CONV-001) — theoretical alignment, not operational
FM architectural precedent — analogy, not implementation
purely_huf_cls: BTL crossover measurements (pending — Peter's lab work)
CL-05 controller implementation (crossover network as physical controller)
CL-04 design authority (active design decisions, not observation)
union_territory: The claim that HUF measures what it was designed to measure (requires BTL as ground truth)
Full CL-01 through CL-05 operational demonstration
The 'self-governing system' narrative (framework enforcing discipline on its creator — this is about the union of GOV methodology and CLS practice)
Calibration rack test T6 (BTL suite) — the 16th test that closes the rack

immediate_work_plan.section_purpose: What must be done next to strengthen HUF-GOV standalone, in priority order.

priority_1.task: Forward signal triad — EMBER monthly deceptive drift test
priority_1.rationale: The forward signal is HUF-GOV's most valuable and most vulnerable claim. Single-domain. If it fails to replicate, it remains finance-specific (still valuable, but not general). If it replicates, HUF-GOV gains a third leg.
priority_1.data_needed: EMBER monthly electricity generation by fuel type, for countries with known energy shocks
priority_1.method: Build monthly fuel-type carrier for each country. Compute K_eff and TV monthly. Identify deceptive drift regimes. Test whether drift precedes known structural events.
priority_1.success_criterion: Deceptive drift detected before at least 2 of 5 known shocks, with statistical significance comparable to finance results

priority_2.task: Forward signal triad — GDP sector composition deceptive drift test
priority_2.rationale: Third domain for forward signal triad. Different temporal resolution (quarterly vs monthly vs daily) tests scale generality.
priority_2.data_needed: World Bank or OECD quarterly GDP by sector, for countries with known structural shocks
priority_2.method: Build quarterly sector-composition carrier. Compute K_eff and TV quarterly. Test deceptive drift against known GDP structural events.
priority_2.success_criterion: Deceptive drift detected before at least 2 of 5 known shocks

priority_3.task: Structural detection third domain — EMBER or GDP
priority_3.rationale: Claim 2 (structural detection) is at 2 domains. Whichever of EMBER/GDP produces the forward signal data first also provides structural detection evidence, moving Claim 2 to triad status.
priority_3.note: This is a natural byproduct of Priority 1 and 2 — not additional work.

priority_4.task: Document the deceptive drift test protocol
priority_4.rationale: Before running tests on new domains, the protocol must be defined: what constitutes 'deceptive drift' at monthly/quarterly resolution, what statistical tests apply, what thresholds, what constitutes replication vs failure.

claude_can_do: Pull EMBER monthly data and construct carriers
Pull GDP sector data and construct carriers
Compute K_eff, TV, PCA for all new domains
Document all results with evidence chains
Design and write the test protocol
peter_must_do: BTL lab measurements (HUF-CLS, not HUF-GOV — no rush for GOV purposes)
Final governance decisions on carrier selection for new domains (Peter reviews Claude's proposed carriers)
Approve or reject triad status based on results
what_peter_must_do_vs_what_claude_can_do.note: The entire forward signal triad plan is machine-executable. Peter's BTL lab work is HUF-CLS territory and does NOT block HUF-GOV development. This is the whole point of the separation.

ramsar_gate.statement: Ramsar engagement requires the forward signal triad to be complete. Without triad assurance that deceptive drift generalizes beyond finance, approaching conservation scientists with early-warning claims is overclaiming.
ramsar_gate.current_status: GATE CLOSED — forward signal is single-domain
ramsar_gate.gate_opens_when: Deceptive drift replicates in at least 1 of 2 non-financial domains (EMBER or GDP), giving 2 of 3 domains
ramsar_gate.full_triad_when: Deceptive drift replicates in both EMBER and GDP, giving 3 of 3 domains
ramsar_gate.peterson_gate: Peterson letter can be sent now — it describes convergence and asks questions. It does NOT claim Ramsar readiness. The letter is HUF-GOV territory (theoretical alignment) not forward signal territory.

corpus_trail.parent: GOV-001 (Governance Architecture — defines the three modes)
corpus_trail.triggered_by: Peter's directive for clean HUF-GOV standalone with triad-supported data
related_documents: HSA-001 (Standing Assessment — triad status per claim)
corpus_trail.resolves: Clean separation between HUF-GOV and HUF-CLS. Triad inventory for every HUF-GOV claim. Forward signal triad plan. Ramsar gate criteria.
